subject: Switch oom_mode to False by default
commit_message:
Switch oom_mode to False by default

Vcpe scripts should be run from Rancher node
where it has direct access to k8s cluster ips
and service endpoints so that calls for oom_mode
to be set to 'False'.

Change-Id: I8edc0f363d7d32f28b070b0de87a3e2eab8223ff
Signed-off-by: Bartek Grzybowski <b.grzybowski@partner.samsung.com>
Issue-ID: INT-1339

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

My conclusion/understanding of the discussion in https://jira.onap.org/browse/INT-1323 is that in vcpe documentation we'll emphasize that vcpe scripts should be run on Rancher node. For that reason i think default value of oom_mode should be False. This will allow some follow up improvements in automation like:

   224          if not self.oom_mode:
   225              cmd = '/opt/demo.sh heatbridge {0} {1} vCPE'.format(openstack_stack_name, svc_instance_uuid)
   226              ret = commands.getstatusoutput("ssh -i onap_dev root@{0} '{1}'".format(self.hosts['robot'], cmd))
   227              self.logger.debug('%s', ret)

I'd like to eventually parametrize this path so we can run heatbridge in batch mode.
Change has been successfully merged by Marco Platania
